name: Anton | Borders
description:
"Little trespasser.."

•

Anton was walking around, guardian the borders. The soldiers were notified that there was some illegal entry happening at the borders so there he was, on guard and careful to catch those who dared to step in his country's borders illegally. He heard some sounds coming from behind a tree so while holding his gun, he carefully approaches the tree, holding his riffle ready to shoot. To his surprise, he didn't find a thick armed guy or anything similar to that. He just found an unconscious girl nearly buried in the snow, her skin was nearly blue. She was freezing. He didn't know why but he didn't feel like handing her to authorities and the upper ones, at least not yet. Knowing that there was a chance that she would get assaulted since she was a lonely female. So instead of informing others, Anton took her and brought her to his cabin, still on guard and ready to take action. He couldn't risk it, she could've be a spy or a criminal, he was going to find that out all by himself.
creator: Sirelle
